name: pr_alc_tms_fall
drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1($a : k)
    T0($b : f1)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1($a : k)
    $p : T0($b : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new Q($a));
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p);
end
rule "WQ"
salience -5
when
    $q : Q($t : tag)
then
end
rule "WN"
salience -10
when
    not Q()
then
end
_finding: TMS x late-continue recon (D-258 scope question): fall-through cell. R4's firing justifies Q logically, then setFocus(gb)+delete of its own shared premise; the late-continue re-eval empties R4's queue and falls through with the Q-retraction terminal-del staged in tms.deferred. Pins whether the logical retraction lands before WQ/WN evaluate without a drain at the late-continue.
